name: Warehouse Slip Process in Boise

mainEntity.name: Workers comp steps after slip and fall in Boise warehouse?
mainEntity.text: Workers comp steps after slip and fall in Boise warehouse?

acceptedAnswer.text: Boise warehouse slip report to supervisor seek medical aid file Form D61 with Idaho SIF attend appointments follow light duty if offered.[1]

suggestedAnswer.text: Warehouses high risk OSHA reportable. Surveillance key evidence. Comp covers PT ergonomics training post-injury. Insurers watch for malingering. Local Boise firms handle industrial claims.[1]

description: Boise warehouse slip report to supervisor seek medical aid file Form D61 with Idaho SIF attend appointments follow light duty if offered.[1]
